• Kills 99.9% of germs
• Tough on dirt and stains
• Advanced cleaning

• Dettol 4 in 1 Disinfectant Multi Action Cleaner kills 99.9% of germs
• It gives you an all-purpose cleaning solution for your home with trusted protection from illness-causing germs
• Removes even the most stubborn stains
• Makes your surfaces sparkling clean
• Suitable for use on floors, kitchens and bathrooms
• Leaves a refreshing Lavender fragrance that lasts long, making your home even fresher
metaData.Preparation:
• Everyday Cleaning:
Dilute 125ml in 2 liters of water for all hard surfaces
• Extra Disinfection:
Dilute 125ml in 1 liter of water and leave for 5 minutes before wiping
• Tough Stain Cleaning:
Apply undiluted with a cloth or a sponge and wipe the surface clean
metaData.Storage Information: Keep out of reach of children

metaData.Key Information:
• 100% naturally-derived cleaning agents
• Kills 99.9% bacteria
• Effectively removes food grease and stains
• Gentle to use on dining areas, baby items, electrical appliances, etc
metaData.Preparation:
1. Open the pack by peeling the resealable adhesive label
2. Pull out a piece of natural plant-based surface sheet and reseal label
3. Wipe directly on usage areas, and leave it to dry
4. Dispose the used sheet.
metaData.Storage Information: Avoid exposure of Wipes to direct sunlight

metaData.sapReference: ZIA5 Buy 40 Dollars Kao Get 5 Dollars Off BU 0626

metaData.Key Information:
• Kills up to 99% harmful bacteria and captures grease and leaves household surface bright
• 2 in 1 formula disinfects and removes dirt
• 24 hours long lasting freshness
• Can be used on marble, tiles, parquet, terazzo, cement as well as countertops, cupboard interiors, tabletops, toilet bowls and linoleum
metaData.Preparation:
• For Diluted Use:
1.5 capful with 1/2 pail filled with water
• For more Concentrated Use:
2.5 capful with 900ml pail filled with water
• Precaution:
1. Dangerous if ingested
2. Irritating to eyes, respiratory system and skin
3. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical attention
4. May cause sensitization by skin contact therefore, wear suitable gloves
